chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمَكْرِ وَ الْغَدْرِ وَ الْخَدِيعَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 138 – The Plotting and the Treachery and the Deception

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/318)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع كالحسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/318)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) لَوْ لَا أَنَّ الْمَكْرَ وَ الْخَدِيعَةَ فِي النَّارِ لَكُنْتُ أَمْكَرَ النَّاسِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim, raising it who said,
‘Amir Al-Momineenasws said: ‘Had it not been that the plotting and the deception would be in the Fire, Iasws would have been the most skilful in evil planning’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hisham ibn Salim in a marfu’ manner who has said the following: “Amir al-Mu’minin, Ali ibn abu Talib (a.s.) has said, ‘Had evil planning and deceit not been in the fire, I would have been extremely skillful in evil planning.’”
